name: Flatman Family Beans and Ham - Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Beef soup base or bouillon
1 tsp Chicken soup base or bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. If using beans other than Lima beans, soak the beans overnight or boil them on the stovetop for 10 minutes before adding to the crockpot to ensure they are tender at the end of cooking time.
2. Combine all ingredients in the crockpot.
3. Cook on low for 8 hours, or until the beans are tender.
Note: Use 4 cups water if using Baby Lima beans. Use 2 tablespoons dried vegetables instead of 1 cup fresh. Use 1 tablespoon dried carrot tops instead of sliced fresh carrots.
